Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Basil (Bill) S. Shiber, 925.935.9400 for Defendants Thomas Paoli and Margaret Coyne.
A. Thomas Koster, 415.713.8680 for Plaintiff Jeremy Ricks.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THOMAS PAOLI, MARGARET COYNE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. The operative complaint upon which the Notice of Pendency of Action is based, does not state a real property claim. Attorney's fees granted in the amount of $9,000. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
